name: Md. Hadiuzzaman Bappy
about: After completeing my college education, i admitted to Khulna University as a Computer Science Student. During those years i have tried to learn a variety of things. In which Developing and Designing attracted me mostly. I have done so many frontend work both on web and mobile platform. I have also did some quality brand idendity designing. Later designing and developing fusion me to have enthusiasm for becoming a Product designer also known as User Interface (UI) designer.
